title: 2-Axis CNC Belt-Drive Plotter
description: CoreXY belt-drive 2D plotter using two NEMA 17 steppers, servo pen lift, and Grbl firmware accepting G-code over USB-C to draw A4 graphics.
objective: A4 drawing area; ±0.5 mm accuracy; up to 100 mm/s.
constraints: 2020 aluminium extrusion frame; ≤ £60; 12 V / 3 A supply.
supporting_fact_titles: Stepper Motor Drive — Full Step and Microstepping

element_usage_notes.RC Servo Joint Actuator: SG90 micro-servo for 5 mm pen lift; 0°=down, 45°=up.
